items.title: Apple Will Pay $250 Million to Settle Lawsuit Over Siri's AI Features
items.summary: If you bought an iPhone 15 or 16 in the US, you could be set to pocket up to $95 per device as Apple settles class-action lawsuit.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
